name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: New File Created in Temporary Directory
notes:
This Building Block detects new files created under temporary directories. Certain temporary directories may be used by adversaries to drop malicious files.

Note: The directories monitored are:
-- Windows --
AppData\Local\Temp
AppData\Roaming\
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: New File Created in Temporary Directory on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, Audit.Create Activity Attempted, Audit.Create Activity Succeeded
when the event matches LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES '.*?appdata\\local\\temp' OR LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES '.*?appdata\\roaming' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: New File Created in Temporary Directory on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, Audit.Create Activity Attempted, Audit.Create Activity Succeeded
AND when the event matches LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES '.*?appdata\\local\\temp' OR LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES '.*?appdata\\roaming' AQL filter query
